title: ブライト・イン・ニューワールド

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following an excursion, Mejiro Bright invites me
to...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Here we are—the Lolita Fashion Expo! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Ah, the day has finally arrived... Oh, how I've
looked forward to this exhibition! Trainer, is your
heart ready for this?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I'm glad to hear it. Shall we, then? ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, how marvelous! This venue... Its interior
design mirrors that of Elizabethan churches!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I see... This is a joint exhibit, for both elegant
and classical lolita fashion styles.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Those styles take inspiration from the clothing
worn by royalty and aristocrats of the Middle
Ages and onward. So, essentially...
choice_data_list: They're trying to immerse us in that era, huh.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if only I'd worn a dress. I could have taken
such wonderful photos here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I could've been photographed sitting in that elegant Victorian-style chair... Sigh... How delightful that would have been. ♪
choice_data_list:
Ah, so you can interact with some of the
exhibits here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes, indeed. ♪ This is a very special place.
Coming here, I truly feel as if I've stepped into a
wonderland.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
In fact, the cafe that was set up as part of this
expo has made a name for itself as a sweet Lolita
fashion cafe. But I particularly recommend...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: The Macaron Tower! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Very much so, yes! They're so cute. Simply
looking at them soothes my heart.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
And unlike chocolate or ice cream, they don't
melt, so I can enjoy them at my leisure.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Would you like to share a portion? We can
replenish our energy before heading to the next
exhibit! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: And here we have... the gothic Lolita exhibit!
choice_data_list:
This set looks like an abandoned Victorian
house.

This set looks like an abandoned Victorian
house.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
But this area is still calming and chic. Its
atmosphere is similar to that of a haunted house...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, what's this? "O visitor, lift the veil and
awaken the coffin's inhabitant from its slumber."
So we simply have to lift this veil?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Let's do it together, Trainer. Three... Two...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
My, what a surprise. To think that a skeleton
would emerge amidst a cloud of smoke.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but my heart did leap, I assure you. It jumped
as if this were a tense scene in a fictional
adventure! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I wasn't expecting such thrilling twists. How
delightful. Oh, how I'd love to come here every
day. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Gorgeous clothing, delicious treats, and
heart-pounding adventure. The day has simply
flown by.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. Thank you so very much for today,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I had such a wondrous time, and it's all because of
you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes. To me, sharing the things I most enjoy with
another feels particularly special...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: And extraordinarily magical.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...Today, Trainer, you knocked on the door to my
world.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
What will happen once it's open? How will it feel
to spend time with you, Trainer, in the world
within my heart?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee! I feel as though I got a glimpse at the
answers to those questions today.
choice_data_list: Let's keep searching for those answers.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee! I feel as though I got a glimpse at the
answers to those questions today.
choice_data_list: Let's keep searching for those answers.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes, let's! There are still so many topics I've yet to
share with you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
As we've already covered dolls and Lolita fashion
fairly thoroughly...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Why don't we delve into antiques and
history?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee! My heart is beating even faster than it
did in the haunted house.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I wonder... You know, even I have yet to
glimpse its boundaries.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I do have quite the appetite for certain
things. I dream of attending international doll
shows and fashion exhibitions...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh! And if I were to visit Europe, seeing
Renaissance-era architecture and sculptures and
whatnot would be a must!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
As would taking commemorative photographs of
my dolls at landmarks! ♪ My horizons remain ever
so bountiful!
